ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "overall_case_no" INTEGER /* Overall case number associated with the episode */,
  "year_case_no" INTEGER /* Year case number indicating the season/year */,
  "episode_no" INTEGER /* Individual episode number within its season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "production_budget" TEXT /* Production budget for the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_overall_case_no FOREIGN KEY ("overall_case_no") REFERENCES cases ("overall_case_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "overall_case_no" INTEGER /* Overall case number as referenced in episodes */,
  "case_title" TEXT /* Title of the case */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., solved, unsolved) */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., murder, theft) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* Audience rating for the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date when the viewership data was collected */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the episode was viewed (e.g., TV, streaming) */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographics information of the viewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_team" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in production (e.g., Producer, Writer) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the team member (e.g., production, post-production) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the team member joined the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode associated with the script */,
  "script_content" TEXT /* Content of the script for the episode */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the script */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the script was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scripts_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being commented on */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_comments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES production_team ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Murder, Fraud) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_genres" (
  "episode_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-genre association */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_genres_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (in JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (read or unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
